cards.notes: Bonjour = used until evening. Bonsoir = good evening. Salut = casual hi/bye.

cards.back: S'il vous plaît (formal) / S'il te plaît (informal)
cards.notes: Literally: 'if it pleases you.' Abbreviated: SVP.

cards.front: Thank you / Thank you very much
cards.notes: Merci bien = thanks a lot (slightly less formal than merci beaucoup).
Si = yes (when contradicting a negative statement). 'Tu n'aimes pas ça?' 'Si!' = 'Yes I do!'
Comprendre = to understand. In spoken French, 'ne' is often dropped: 'Je comprends pas.'
Parler = to speak. Je parle français = I speak French.

cards.back: Comment allez-vous ? (formal) / Comment vas-tu ? / Ça va ? (informal)
cards.notes: Response: Ça va bien, merci. Et vous/toi ? = I'm fine, thanks. And you?
Conditional of 'vouloir.' More polite than 'Je veux' (I want). Je voudrais un café = I'd like a coffee.
Où est la gare ? = Where is the train station? Où sont les toilettes ? = Where are the restrooms?
Combien = how much/how many. Ça fait combien ? = How much does that come to? (at checkout)
Je mange = I eat. Je bois = I drink. Boire is irregular: je bois, tu bois, il boit, nous buvons.

cards.back: Le petit-déjeuner / Le déjeuner / Le dîner
cards.notes: In Belgium/Switzerland: breakfast = le déjeuner, lunch = le dîner, dinner = le souper.
Avant-hier = day before yesterday. Après-demain = day after tomorrow.

cards.back: À gauche / À droite / Tout droit
cards.notes: Tournez à gauche = turn left. Continuez tout droit = continue straight ahead.
Je suis américain(e) = I am American. Je suis étudiant(e) = I am a student. No article needed for professions.
Bon = good (quality). Bien = well (manner). C'est bon = it's good. C'est bien = it's fine/well done.
Un grand café = a large coffee. Une petite maison = a small house. Adjective agrees with noun gender.
J'aime le chocolat = I like chocolate. J'adore voyager = I love traveling. Aimer + person = to love.
Literally: 'I call myself...' Comment vous appelez-vous ? = What is your name? (formal)
In France, the waiter won't bring the bill until you ask. Service (tip) is usually included (service compris).
